name: Pasta with a Carrot Basil Sauce and Pine Nuts or Navy Beans
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces angel hair pasta, cooked and drained
3 large carrots, juice only (reserve about 1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Extract the juice from the carrots using a juicer or citrus reamer.
2. Reserve about 1/2 cup of the carrot pulp for later use.
3. In a food processor, finely chop the basil leaves and garlic.
4. Add a small amount of carrot juice to aid processing.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Add the pine nuts, grated lemon rind, and process until smooth.
7. Gradually add more carrot juice as needed for desired consistency.
8. Stir in the extra virgin olive oil to thicken the sauce.
9. In a skillet or sauté pan over medium heat, toast the pine nuts.
10. Add the prepared sauce mixture and gently heat it.
11. Mix about 1 tablespoon of reserved carrot pulp with additional juice until smooth.
12. Heat until reduced slightly without boiling.
13. Stir in lemon juice to taste.
14. Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss well to coat.
15. Serve with grated Parmesan cheese or Romano shavings.
